nasb.text: Where then are your prophets who prophesied to you, saying, ‘The king of Babylon will not come against you or against this land’?

esv.text: Where are your prophets who prophesied to you, saying, ‘The king of Babylon will not come against you and against this land’?

cnv.text: 你們的先知曾向你們預言說：‘巴比倫王必不會來攻擊你們和這地。’他們現今在哪裡呢？

ccb.text: 那些曾向你们预言‘巴比伦王绝不会来这里攻打你们’的先知如今在哪里呢？
